title: Cryosophila nana

Cryosophila nana is a small to medium-sized palm, typically growing up to 4 meters in height. This species is characterized by its solitary stem and pinnate leaves. Cryosophila nana is also known to produce small, yellowish flowers on a tall inflorescence.
